name: Vampiric Cape
description: Notes Part of the Vampire Rogue Set.
effects: Effect on Self: Healing for 4 seconds With Soulcursed Scythe: DEX Boost (+10 DEX) on ability use for 4 seconds With Ruthven’s Rosary: Spawns 3 bats summons that circle and deal 60-80 (70) Armor Piercing Damage every 0.4 seconds Sneak: Invisible for 5 seconds. After 1 second can be canceled by shooting. On Invisible end: Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 55 (+4 per VIT > 50) and 40% (+1% per VIT > 50) of target’s defense as additional damage for 2.4 seconds
